title: ANC - Change ANC Mode value (Adaptive/Standard)
scenario: ANC mode selection (Adaptive/Standard) does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Tap on Audio Settings, then tap on ANC.
4. In the ANC tab, select an ANC mode (e.g., Adaptive or Standard).
5. Close the ANC tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping back.
6. Reopen the ANC tab by navigating again to Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
7. Observe the currently selected ANC mode.
expected: The ANC mode selected in step 4 (e.g., Adaptive or Standard) should remain unchanged and still be selected after reopening the ANC tab.
